name: Pepper's Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Light cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the egg noodles until al dente, then drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles and all other ingredients.
3. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the cheese slices.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until bubbly and golden brown on top.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 72, fat 3g, cholesterol 5mg, carbohydrate 3g, sodium 146mg. Exchanges: Meat 1.
